package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice prefix checks instead of `strings.HasPrefix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario654Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return len(haystack) >= len(needle) && haystack[:len(needle)] == needle
}
